# Hand Drill

| Field | Value |
|-------|-------|
| Rarity | Event |
| Class | Any |

## Description

Hand Drill is an Event Relic from the Trash Heap. It applies 2 Vulnerable when an enemy's block is broken.

## Notes

### Sources

Can only be obtained randomly from Trash Heap by selecting the  option.

## Update History

- **Early Access v0.98**
    - Added Hand Drill to the game.
